subject: Gaming
title: GamerGate: A Community Divided
description: A quick win: understand GamerGate: A Community Divided.

hook.text: GamerGate started as a debate about game journalism. It became a harassment campaign that split the community.

buildup.text: In 2014, allegations about a game developer's personal life spiraled into a massive online movement.

discovery.text: Some claimed it was about ethics in journalism. But women and minorities faced targeted harassment and threats.

twist.text: The movement's tactics—doxxing, threats, and coordinated attacks—foreshadowed broader online radicalization patterns.

climax.text: GamerGate showed that gaming communities could be weaponized and that online hate has real-world consequences.

punchline.text: It started about journalism. It became about harassment. The scars remain.

quiz.question: What broader pattern did GamerGate foreshadow?
options: Online radicalization and the weaponization of internet communities
